sections.heading: Two ways to search
sections.body:
**Linear search:** look at every element until you find it. Works on anything. O(n).

**Binary search:** only works if the data is **sorted**, but it's wildly faster. O(log n).

sections.title: Old phone book vs random list
sections.body: Find 'Patel' in a random list of names? You read every name (linear). Find 'Patel' in an alphabetical phone book? Open the middle, P comes after M, look right half, repeat (binary).
